summary_bullets: That's right, guys, golden metals are going to the moon, while crypto is doing absolutely nothing.
And that's why I'm giving you a trading strategy for golden metals so you can benefit from it.
This is the strategy I'm talking about.
Look how nicely it captured the uptrends in gold and is now still invested with an open profit of 89%.
It will also help you answer the question if you should still invest into the metals market, get out, how high can it still go, and as well, how to play it in the future.

You don't need this, but I want to show you because I'm proud of it, which started in October 2023 here and is still invested with an open profit of 164% on gold.
So anyone that has joined the course early and used the strategy is now very happy.
